$comment: Folder architecture contract for a Flutter project, derived from memox-v3/lib (Clean Architecture: domain has no outward imports; presentation -> domain; data implements domain). `dirs` are created under the configured source root (tool.config.json srcDir, default lib/). `featureSubdirs` is the per-feature folder set used by `run.mjs feature <name>`. Edit this file to change the architecture once; the tool follows.
$dirsNote: Business sub-domains under domain/ (e.g. srs/, study/, tag/) and per-feature usecase folders (domain/usecases/<feature>/) are CONTENT, added per feature — not part of the base skeleton. Run `feature <name>` to add a feature's folders.
$featureSubdirsNote: memox-v3 feature folders are a subset of {routes, screens, viewmodels|controllers, widgets}. This default uses viewmodels (Riverpod Annotation notifiers); pass --controllers to use controllers/ instead.
